titleStmt.title: SII 10.173: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 173. (A.R. No. 545 of 1925.) ON A STONE SET UP NEAR THE TEMPLE OF RĀMASVĀMI, ŚRĪRĀMAPURAM, SARVASIDDHI TALUK, VIZAGAPATAM DISTRICT. Ś. 1092.

summary.p: States that Kulōttuṅga Rājēndra-Chōḍa's minister and Commander-in-chief of forces, Prōliya-Peggaḍa granted land and a garden in Chaṭṭipuramu to God Chōḍīśvaramahādēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī sakavaraṣaṁbulu 1092 nēṁṭṭi mā¨rggaśiraba
hala 2 śukravāramu modalugāṁ jaṭṭivuramuna poḍama
paḍumaṭa śrīcōḍīśvaramahādēvaraku śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara kulōttuṁgarājēṁdracōḍayarājala pradhāni śrīsa
mastasēnādhipati vrōliya peggaḍayu noṁṭivārunu
vāsana peggaḍaku dha¨rmmuvugāṁ jōḍīśvaramahādēvaraku nitya ni
vēdyamunakuṁ jaṭṭivuramuna sānulumunnū¨rvvuraku śrīkara
ṇamunaku śrāvaṇaṁ gaṭṭaṁ beṭṭidilipeṭṭina bhūmi saṭṭivuramuna rāje
laceṟuvu piṟuṁda nēmaṁdumu nēlayuṁ jōḍīśvaramahādēvaragu
ḍi dakṣiṇabhāgamunaṁ buvvuṁdōṁṭṭakuṁ buṭṭeṁḍu nēlayuṁ gābera
si mūṁḍu vuṭluṁbaṁdumu nēlayu nācaṁdrā¨rkastāyikamugā
m beṭṭitimi Īdharmmuvunaku nevvarēni vighnamu dalaṁccinavāru ga
ṁgga kaṟuta vēyi nēnūṟu gavulalaṁ boḍcinavāru śrīvā
ṇarāsi vraccinavāru peddakoḍuku kapālamunaṁ gāṭukavaṭṭi
navāru 9 svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁddharā ṣa
ṣṭiṁ varuṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
śatkamiṁda goṁpasāri koḍku bhīmasā¨ryyāḥ
Digital edition of SII 10.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
